status: active (owner buy-in 2026-06-12: Don Carlos + Margarita said 'this is what we want'; 50% deposit pending; Ecosystem tier likely)
design_authority: Jose (Federation pod design lane). This genome captures a STARTING POINT mined from Jose's own draft (proposal v4 + DESIGN-REFERENCE.md). Jose owns final color; we build the structure, he colors it.

motifs: full-bleed cinematic hero: golden-hour warehouse/truck/equipment photography (honest, DataTech scans trucks and boxes on arrival)
orange as a brand statement (luminous, Cloudflare-style), not just button accents
thin concentric arc/swoosh lines (golden-peach); orange footer band
an 'Ask DataTech' entry-point window: build the window in Phase 1, wire it to the intelligence layer in Phase 4
anti: busy tile-heavy grid (the old ecbrands storefront look)
list-only product pages with no imagery
badge clutter, urgency banners, countdown timers
emojis anywhere (id8Labs law; Hero Icons or none)

references.pro_target: Cloudflare homepage (the client's own 'Version PRO' mockup is literally a Cloudflare screenshot, so this is documented client intent, not loose inspiration)
references.cinematic: Terminal Industries (logistics yard OS, same subject matter, embedded 'Ask' AI field in nav)
references.baseline: ecbrands demo (the conventional storefront being elevated; keep the substance, lose the clutter)

voice.register: confident B2B wholesale distributor: restrained, technical, premium. One statement, one action, lots of air. The antidote to the busy storefront.
lexicon: Tres decadas de confianza e innovacion
Crecer / Solucionar / Gestionar / Abastecer (deck growth pillars, usable as site copy)
Data Tech Inc., founded 1996, Miami FL

ethos.positioning: wholesale distributor + logistics hub for printing supplies/hardware and tech solutions across Latin America and the Caribbean. The Phase 1 facelift is the 'Hybrid' bridge between V2 (ecbrands) and 'Version PRO' (Oct 2026), planting a clean, confident, AI-credible brand the later phases pay off as an intelligence layer.
ethos.serves: in order: the client (Data Tech / Nixon), the distributor's customers across LatAm + Caribbean, the commercializable banner slots (e.g. Epson), id8Labs + the Federation pod
ethos.pod: Federation pod with Jose: Jose = client/UX/design lane, Eddie = backend/arch/DB/infra, quarterback shared
ethos.phases: Phase 1 facelift (Hybrid) now -> PRO launch Oct/Nov 2026; intelligence-layer 'Ask' wired in Phase 4
would_never: ship the busy tile-grid clutter the facelift exists to retire
override Jose's color without his sign-off (design authority is his)
fabricate brand-share, growth, or company facts (sourced from the corporate deck)

golden_set: engagements/datatech/inbox-attachments/data-tech-proposal-phase1-2026-06-03-v4.html (Jose's latest proposal, source of hex + fonts)
eval.form_parity_threshold: an asset fails on any anti-design hit (tile clutter, no-image product list, emoji), any color outside Jose's recolor, or any drift from the cinematic full-bleed direction. Compliance with Jose's design authority is binary, not scored.
